news.title: Is CRM Stock Really Broken Or Just On Sale?
news.summary: The market has left this software giant for dead on the price chart, but its financial statements keep telling a story of a business that is very much alive.

news.title: Adobe (ADBE) Buys Topaz Labs As AI Revenue Runs At 3x Prior Year
news.summary: Adobe (NasdaqGS:ADBE) has agreed to acquire Topaz Labs, a specialist in AI-powered creative tools. The company reports AI-first net new annualized recurring revenue running at roughly 3x the level of the prior year. These moves point to a tighter integration of generative AI across Adobe's core creative and digital media offerings. Adobe enters this phase of AI expansion with its stock at $230.61,

news.title: Adobe (ADBE) Freemium AI Push Puts Valuation Back In Focus
news.summary: Adobe (ADBE) is in focus after management outlined a shift toward a freemium approach for its AI powered products, tying success to AI first annual recurring revenue, which is now above US$500 million. See our latest analysis for Adobe. The freemium AI push comes at a time when Adobe’s share price has bounced, with a 1 day share price return of 3.12% and 30 day share price return of 13.03%. Howeve

news.title: IBM Stock Plunges 25% After Weak Q2 Results; CEO Admits Tech Giant ‘Faltered’
news.summary: IBM shares tumbled Tuesday after the software giant posted preliminary results for the second quarter that disappointed.  IBM CEO Arvind Krishna said some of IBM’s customers are pulling back as memory chips and server prices soar.  IBM stock is getting hammered and dragging other software stocks down with it after the tech giant warned clients are pulling back spending.

news.title: Adobe Systems (ADBE) Recently Broke Out Above the 50-Day Moving Average
news.summary: Should investors be excited or worried when a stock crosses above the 50-Day simple moving average?

news.title: Software stocks crash as IBM results deliver "devastating blow"
Is Adobe Stock Really Broken, Or Just Violently Marked Down?
news.summary: The market has punished this software giant as if its core business is failing, yet the company's financial engine continues to run with remarkable efficiency.

news.title: We’re Bullish on Adobe Despite 40% Decline From Peak Levels
news.summary: Adobe has lost nearly 40% of its value over the past year while its underlying business keeps hitting records and raising guidance. Something in that math does not add up, and figuring out which side is wrong could define the trade.
